summary: Frontend-only testing completed for OmniVital wellness app. All 10 test cases passed. Verified homepage, product detail pages, responsive tablet layout, navigation, and auth redirect functionality.

issues: React Router v7 future flag warnings present - not blocking but should be addressed for future compatibility

critical_code_review_comments: React Router future flag warnings should be addressed by adding v7_startTransition and v7_relativeSplatPath flags to router config for v7 compatibility
test_credentials: No auth credentials available - tested public routes only
seed_data_creation: None - products are from static file src/data/products.ts
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 reported issues have been fixed and verified: 1) Auth loading state race condition - no flicker observed during rapid navigation, 2) Favicon correctly set to favicon.png, 3) Voice agent button shows branded look with OV Voice label, 4) Tablet viewport (768px) shows 4:3 aspect ratio product images via sm:aspect-[4/3] class

homepage_load.details: Hero section, product grid, navbar all visible. Page title correct.

pdp_ov_drive.details: Daily ritual pricing ($2.13 / daily ritual) displayed correctly. Subscribe & Save 20% toggle works - shows crossed out price and discount when toggled.

pdp_ov_bright.details: Product page loads correctly with pricing ($2.40 / daily ritual), hero ingredient, and category.

tablet_responsive.details: At 768px viewport, product cards have sm:aspect-[4/3] class applied for shorter 4:3 aspect ratio images.

favicon.details: Favicon link correctly set to /favicon.png in index.html.

voice_agent_button.details: Voice agent floating button visible in bottom-right with 'OV Voice' label and branded logo.

navbar_sign_in.details: 'SIGN IN / JOIN' button visible in navbar when not authenticated.

navigation_no_flicker.details: Navigation from / to /product/ov-drive and back works without flicker or loading spinner.

collective_redirect.details: Navigation to /collective correctly redirects to /auth when not signed in (RequireAuth working).

rapid_navigation.details: Rapid navigation between 6 routes showed no loading spinner/flicker - auth race condition fix verified.
